evaluation.summary: The variance-to-mean ratio R(k) of gaps between integers coprime to the k-th primorial deviates from 1 and increases with k, contradicting the hypothesis that it equals 1.
next_directions: Extend computation to larger k to verify the trend and assess computational errors
Conduct a formal statistical test to confirm the significance of the observed increase in R(k)
Compare the empirical results with existing theoretical models of primorial gap distributions
